---
title: "start.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/core/commands/start.ts"
loc: 29
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.90
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 4.76
overall_score: 5.55
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [join](file://node:path)
- [CortexLink](file://../../cortex_link.ts)
- [executeCycle](file://../../agent_loop.ts)

### Exports
- `registerStartCommand`
- `registerStartCommand`
- `link`
